Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 60% of SummitArc Robotics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 2019 12345 K) by Lion City Capital Holdings Ltd.
Acquirer: Lion City Capital Holdings Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard issuer; UEN: 2008 76543 A), registered address: 88 Bayfront Rise #42-01, Singapore 049999.
Target: SummitArc Robotics Pte. Ltd., registered address: 15 Pioneer Tech Loop #03-05, Singapore 628888; IRAS Tax Ref.: T24LP1234Q (fictional).
Contact: Mr. Adrian Koh (CEO) — Tel: +65 8 1 2 3 4 5 6 7; E m a i l: adrian.koh@lioncap.sg; Deal workspace: https://deal.lioncap.sg/room?uen=201912345K&tx=ACQ60.
Seller Representative: Ms. Leena Tan (Passport No.: K1234567Z, country: SG), c/o 15 Pioneer Tech Loop #03-05, Singapore 628888; role-only signatory — Company Secretary.
Purchase Consideration: S$48,500,000 cash and S$6,000,000 in new Lion City Capital Holdings Ltd. shares (subject to SGX Listing Manual and SFA MNPI restrictions).
Funding: SGD term loan from Lion City Bank Ltd (SWIFT: LCBLSG22), Account No.: 019-123456-7; bank contact e-mail: treasury@lioncitybank.sg.
Conditions Precedent: MAS approval (if applicable), SGX-ST clearance for share issuance, PDPA-compliant data room access; no MAC shall be deemed to have occurred due solely to public-source index movements.
Due Diligence: includes verification of UENs and tax references; note that vendor ACRA ref 2019 12345 X (invalid checksum) is a placeholder and should not be relied upon.
Employee Matters: retention of key engineers; new employment agreements under SG law; HR helpline 1800-000-0000 is for general enquiries only and not a deal contact.
Announcements: to be made via SGXNET consistent with SGX Listing Manual; drafts circulated to board-only list, not to “name (as per NRIC)” form fields in templates.
Confidentiality/PDPA: parties shall process business-contact information only; do not upload NRIC scans; where needed, use masked data (e.g., Passp0rt N0. K1234567Z) and redact residential addresses.
Governing Law: Singapore; Dispute Resolution: SIAC arbitration; longstop date: 30 September 2026; backstop URL for notices: https://sgxnet.example.sg/announce?issuer=200876543A&doc=term-sheet.
Execution: authorised signatories only; for internal tracking — project “sealion phase 2” status: in-progress, next steps: draft pdpa notice, prep board papers, upload cap-table v2.
